texto: We should not judge people by their peak of excellence
autor: but by the distance they have traveled from the point where they started.
explicacao: Orientação direta de but by the distance they have traveled from the point where they started. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “We should not judge people by their peak of excellence” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, henry-ward-beecher, should, útil em momentos de reflexao.
